name: Homing Instinct
short_description: Please send a completely intoxicated person home safely.
detailed_description:
ABOUT GAME

Are you drunk? Then go home.

I get drunk when I drink!
I feel good when I drink!
I feel good when I'm drunk?

When you are drunk, your cerebral and cerebellum are paralyzed, and your cerebral neocortex function is reduced, thereby suppressing your reason.

drunk lightly -> feel good
drunk Moderately -> instincts become harder to control.
drunk extremely -> memory, reason disappear.

After being completely intoxicated, will my body be able to go home safely with only my instincts left?

Even if you are drunk and unconscious, you can go home with your instincts.
A platform game that reaches its final destination at the risk of returning to its starting point in case of a mistake.

Players must steer a drunk person home safely. In the process, they must start all over again, falling down. It consists of a single stage, can't be saved, and there are no checkpoints.
